title: Add/update interop test verifying PRK and OSCORE outputs match test/vectors/edhoc.json across Rust/Python
description: Implement or fix test_full_handshake or similar in edhoc.rs tests to load vectors from test/vectors/edhoc.json (or create it if missing), run Python reference, compare PRK_*, master_secret, master_salt byte-for-byte. Ensure no_std compatible where possible.
